what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that points to an image asset named Icon_Gold_Drone in the design-assets channel.
observations: The entire file is YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an attachment_type of images.
The target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Drone.
It includes an added timestamp with timezone offset.
The filename is att-cd2dcc96.md matching the id field.
standouts: The image:// URI target for an icon asset.
It belongs to the design-assets channel.
It is a standalone attachment metadata record.
concerns: The target URI does not indicate file format, dimensions, or whether the asset exists.
There is no author or source message reference.
No alt text, caption, or versioning information is present.
notes: A lightweight, timestamped attachment record linking an ID to the Icon_Gold_Drone image asset in the design-assets channel.
questions: Which message or record uses this attachment?
What format and resolution does Icon_Gold_Drone have?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose statement is given, but the fields collectively act as an attachment metadata record, matching the apparent purpose of linking an attachment ID to an image asset.
intention_signals: It appears intended to register an image attachment in the design-assets channel so other records can refer to the Icon_Gold_Drone asset by a stable ID and URI rather than embedding the image directly.
novelty: The use of an image:// URI scheme inside an individual markdown attachment record to target a channel image asset.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped, URI-based mapping from an attachment ID to a named image asset in a specific channel, supporting traceability and indirect referencing.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter markdown attachment record with id att-cd2dcc96 in the design-assets channel that references the image asset image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Drone and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to register a channel attachment pointing to the Icon_Gold_Drone image asset for reuse by other records.
